name: @cursorversinc/medgov-mcp
description: Model Context Protocol server exposing the medical AI governance crosswalk (PMDA / FDA / EU AI Act / WHO / IMDRF / ISO-IEC 42001 / NIST AI RMF / MHLW / METI / JMA) — 13 columns x 10 guidelines.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && node -e "const f='dist/index.js';const fs=require('fs');const s=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');if(!s.startsWith('#!'))fs.writeFileSync(f,'#!/usr/bin/env node\n'+s);fs.chmodSync(f,0o755)"
